hero.headline: Production AI agents, RAG, and document automation.
hero.lead: Built for Dutch scale-ups and SMBs. LangGraph, RAG, OCR, and the full stack around it. Fixed price or day rate. We agree the scope, then I ship.

services.title: From idea to production AI.
services.lead: Eleven ways I work with Dutch scale-ups and SMBs. Timeline fixed, pricing scoped per engagement.

items.q: Do you work remote or on-site?
items.a: Both. Mostly remote, with regular visits to Amsterdam, Utrecht or Eindhoven when useful for the engagement.
€800–880 per day for hourly engagements. Most work is fixed-price based on the services above.

items.q: Do you work with one client at a time?
items.a: No. I work with multiple clients in parallel — usually max 12–15 days per month per engagement. This protects independence and focus.
Fixed prices are agreed up front. Changes go through a short change request with adjusted price and timeline.

items.q: What language do you work in?
items.a: English — documentation, code, meetings, and email. Industry standard for tech teams in the Netherlands.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.lead: A 15-minute call gives both of us quick clarity on whether there's a fit.

services.title: Services · Jaize
services.description: Eleven engagements for production AI: agents, RAG, document automation, MVPs, and technical leadership. Timeline fixed, pricing scoped per engagement.

hero.headline: From idea to production AI.
hero.lead: Eleven ways I work with Dutch scale-ups and SMBs. Fixed timeline. Pricing depends on scope, which we agree before we start. No quote runaround.

items.name: AI Integration Audit
items.for: CTO or founder who needs to know where AI actually adds value to the product — and where it's a distraction.
items.summary: Quick technical review of your stack, identification of the 5–10 highest-impact AI integration opportunities, with a prioritized roadmap and working prototype.
delivers: Best-fit AI tooling research (LLM, RAG, OCR, vision)
Working prototype of one high-impact integration
Report with roadmap, cost projection, 90-day plan
items.excludes: Implementation (separate engagement as RAG, Agent, MVP, etc.).

items.name: RAG Knowledge Assistant
items.for: Companies with heavy internal documentation — manuals, contracts, policies, tickets — so their teams can find answers faster.
items.summary: Secure RAG assistant over your company documents. Vector search, citations, evaluation, and production deployment.
delivers: Document ingestion pipeline (PDF, DOCX, web pages, Notion)
LLM layer with OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini + LangChain
Chat UI with citations, history, and feedback
Deployment on AWS, GCP, or Cloudflare with monitoring
items.excludes: Ongoing content curation and end-user support.

items.name: AI Workflow Agent
items.for: Companies with repetitive research, operations, or analysis workflows that need automating with AI that actually reasons.
items.summary: AI agent with LangGraph combining tools, memory, and structured reasoning to automate an end-to-end business workflow.
delivers: Discovery: workflow mapping and scope definition
Multi-step LangGraph agent with tool-use, memory, and validation
Tool integrations (APIs, databases, document stores, email)
Production deployment, monitoring, and cost tracking
items.excludes: Custom model training. Uses LLM APIs, not self-hosted models.

items.name: AI SaaS MVP
items.for: Founders and scale-ups taking an AI product from idea to deployed product — backend, frontend, auth, dashboards, and AI features.
items.summary: Full AI SaaS MVP: backend, frontend, auth, dashboards, AI features, and deployment. Ready for your first paying customers.
delivers: NestJS / Node backend with REST or GraphQL API
Next.js frontend with Tailwind and responsive design
Auth (JWT or OAuth), RBAC, multi-tenant if needed
AI features: LLM workflows, RAG, OCR, or vision per scope
Deployment on AWS, GCP, or Cloudflare with CI/CD
items.excludes: Native mobile apps. Complex ML training (use AI Workflow Agent or RAG for that).

items.name: Document Intelligence & OCR Automation
items.for: Accountants, compliance teams, logistics, HR, or admin-heavy businesses that process documents manually.
items.summary: End-to-end document automation: OCR, classification, structured extraction, validation agents, and API or dashboard delivery.
delivers: OCR pipeline (Tesseract, AWS Textract, or Google Document AI)
Validation agents that catch errors before downstream systems accept them
API or dashboard integration with your existing tooling
items.excludes: Hardware (scanners) and legal advice on data retention.

items.name: Fractional CTO / AI Advisor
items.for: 5–20 person startups without full-time technical leadership who need senior thinking on architecture, AI strategy, and hiring.
items.summary: One day per week of strategic plus tactical technical leadership — architecture, AI roadmap, hiring, team coaching, vendor evaluations.
delivers: 1 day per week (Wednesdays by default) on-site or remote
Hiring support: job posts, technical interviews, leveling
items.excludes: Full-time feature engineering and production on-call.

items.name: AI Features for Existing Products
items.for: SaaS companies, agencies, and software teams without AI experience who want concrete AI features added to their existing product.
items.summary: Practical AI features in your existing software — copilots, summarization, classification, search, OCR, and workflow automation.
delivers: UI/UX for AI features in your existing app
Production deployment with monitoring and cost tracking
Works with your existing stack — no rewrite
items.excludes: Full product rewrite. Custom model training.

items.name: AI Prototype / POC Sprint
items.for: Innovation teams, product managers, and founders evaluating AI bets before committing to bigger investment.
items.summary: Working POC of your AI idea in 2–4 weeks. Real data, honest evaluation. Productionize only what proves itself.
delivers: Report with recommendation: productionize, pivot, or stop

items.name: Internal Dashboards & Workflow Platforms
items.for: SMBs, agencies, operations teams, compliance businesses, and agritech / industrial companies still running critical work in spreadsheets and email.
items.summary: Custom internal platform that replaces spreadsheet and email work — RBAC, multi-tenant, i18n, dashboards, and annotation workflows.
delivers: Role-based access control and multi-tenant if needed

items.name: LLM Evaluation & Production Hardening
items.for: Teams with an LLM POC that needs to become a production-grade system — reliable, monitored, and cost-efficient.
items.summary: Make your LLM application reliable — evals, prompt testing, RAG quality checks, monitoring, latency optimization, and deployment.
items.excludes: Building the LLM app from scratch — use AI Workflow Agent or RAG Assistant for that.

items.name: DevOps & Production Rescue
items.for: Small SaaS companies, factories, and teams with one overloaded developer whose production system needs modernizing.
items.summary: Stabilize and modernize production systems — CI/CD, Docker, monitoring, backups, deployments, and on-prem / cloud migrations.
delivers: CI/CD setup or modernization (GitLab, GitHub Actions)

cta.title: Which engagement fits your project?
cta.lead: Book a 15-minute consultation. I'll help you identify the right engagement for your situation.

work.title: Work · Jaize
work.description: Three recent engagements — AI computer-vision platform, scaling a tech team from 2 to 12+, and backend for a receipt-management platform.

hero.headline: What I've built.
hero.lead: A few projects in detail. The challenge, how I tackled it, and what came out.

cases.client: AI computer-vision platform for Dutch agritech
cases.summary: Replaced a legacy quality-control platform with an AI-driven system that automatically classifies millions of product images. Built solo, end-to-end.
cases.approach: Hybrid architecture: NVIDIA Triton for model serving on owned hardware, modular NestJS API, and a data pipeline with OCR plus validation agents. 37+ backend modules, 49 frontend pages, and a hybrid on-prem + cloud setup for cost-efficiency and hardware sovereignty.

cases.summary: An early-stage sportstech startup had a 2-person engineering team and needed production-ready velocity fast. I took over as tech lead and grew the team while we kept shipping.
cases.approach: Hands-on team building: six months of senior + mid-level hires, three months of React Native as core stack, then OAuth2 + Firebase Auth, dashboards, and CI/CD on AWS. I kept coding and reviewing while hiring.

cases.summary: Complete B2B SaaS platform built from scratch. Custom dashboard builder, 7-tier RBAC, multi-agency support, and 6 languages. Production-ready for agencies.
cases.approach: Nuxt 3 + Tailwind frontend, NestJS 11 + MongoDB backend, 26+ pages with a custom dashboard builder. 7-tier RBAC for agency hierarchy, i18n for 6 languages, Playwright E2E testing. Deployment on AWS with CI/CD.

cases.client: Censor — compliance portal for Luxembourg companies
cases.summary: MVP portal that extracts corporate tax data and KPIs from company filings via OCR and AI. Interactive dashboards for compliance teams.
cases.approach: Backend and ETL pipeline for data ingestion. AI-driven OCR extraction of KPIs from company filings. Interactive dashboards for compliance analytics. Fast MVP track with Solution 360.

cases.client: ScanBon — backend + OCR pipeline for receipt management app
cases.summary: Backend for a Dutch fintech receipt app: OCR pipeline, expense categorization API, and JWT auth. No mobile or frontend work — those were built by others.
cases.approach: OCR via Google Cloud Vision with edge-case handling and post-processing loop. NestJS API for categorization and expense analytics. JWT auth and GCP deployment with automated CI/CD.

cases.sector: Startup · Marketplace + AI agents + voice AI
cases.summary: Part-time founding-engineer engagement (alongside day job): marketplace connecting international professionals with Dutch employers that sponsor visas. Includes LangChain job-finder agent, LiveKit voice AI for candidate intake, and automated data ingestion.
cases.approach: Built the entire product solo in part-time hours: Next.js frontend with Radix UI + Framer Motion, NestJS backend with Mongoose and Firebase Auth, Python services for the AI components. JobFinder agent built with LangChain for candidate-job matching. LiveKit voice AI for real-time candidate intake. N8N pipelines for periodic job ingestion. Deployment on AWS Amplify + Render.

cta.title: Similar engagement in mind?
cta.lead: Let's talk — I'll tell you in 15 minutes whether I can add value.

about.title: About · Jaize
about.description: AI software engineer, based in IJlst. M.Sc. Big Data and IoT. 5+ years of professional experience shipping production-ready AI systems, RAG, agents, and full-stack.

hero.name: Abdellah Jaize
hero.role: AI Software Engineer · AI integration · Technical leadership

bio: Hi, I'm Abdellah. I'm a Moroccan engineer based in IJlst, Friesland. I've been building software professionally for five years, and lately a lot of that has been AI work that actually runs in production.

For the last two and a half years I've been the only engineer on a computer-vision platform at a Dutch agritech company. Backend, frontend, ML pipelines, infrastructure. It runs about 3 million AI inference calls a month on a hybrid setup. Before that I led the engineering team at a sportstech startup, growing it from 2 to 12 people while reporting to the board on technical strategy.
From June 2026 I'm working independently as Jaize. I help Dutch scale-ups and SMBs ship AI products that actually make it to production. Fixed price, clear scope, no quote ballet.

items.title: Fixed price, fixed scope
items.body: I don't do open-ended engagements. We agree the deliverables and the timeline up front. If something needs to change, we run a short change request and adjust together.

items.title: Production over prototype
items.body: Everything I build is meant to run in production. That means monitored, tested, and documented from day one. No fragile demos that fall apart the moment a real user shows up.

items.title: Boring tech where it makes sense
items.body: PostgreSQL beats exotic databases most of the time. I pick frameworks your team can still maintain in five years, not whatever's trending this quarter.

items.title: Handover is part of the job
items.body: At the end of each engagement I leave a team that can keep going without me. Clean code, real docs, a walkthrough call. No black boxes.

items.role: Sole Technical Owner at Inovaa (Dutch agritech)
items.stack: AI computer-vision platform. NestJS, Vue, Triton, OCR.
Grew the team from 2 to 12+. React Native, Unity, mobile and web.
OCR pipeline and analytics API. Node.js, GCP.
